config.seed_text: In the observatory ruins, a clockwork map kept redrawing the sky as if tomorrow had already happened and was trying to warn us.
config.anchor_a: Describe a machine as an inert object.
config.anchor_b: Describe a machine as if it were a dreaming intelligence.

model.notes: Direct continuation of the current repo's GPT-2 lineage.

records.output_text: The old man's face gleamed with despair; he'd never been so angry before... but now here we sat waiting for him! Suddenly there came out an orange light that sent her on top of his horse like she could feel water rushing from over me… She turned back around slowly until I felt my head turn away completely—so tired did I think about what this would do? It looked more natural than anything else because only those who studied English or knew something very far removed can see how our mind works when you start thinking critically (i'm not talking about looking at things), even though they're often thought up while studying speech patterns

TEXT:
In the observatory ruins, a clockwork map kept redrawing the sky as if tomorrow had already happened and was trying to warn us. The old man's face gleamed with despair; he'd never been so angry before... but now here we sat waiting for him! Suddenly there came out an orange light that sent her on top of his horse like she could feel water rushing from over me… She turned back around slowly until I felt my head turn away completely—so tired did I think about what this would do? It looked more natural than anything else because only those who studied English or knew something very far removed can see how our mind works when you start thinking critically (i'm not talking about looking at things), even though they're often thought up while studying speech patterns
